name: Cookie Mix for the Pantry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together flour, white sugar, brown sugar, baking soda.
2. Cut in shortening with a pastry blender or two knives until mixture is crumbly. Process quickly and stop before the mixture becomes too smooth.
3. Stir in rolled oats and any nuts, chips, or fruits you choose.
4. Store the mixture in a tightly covered, labeled container. It will keep for 1 to 5 months on the pantry shelf in mild, dry weather. During hot summer months, store in the refrigerator.
5. To make cookies:
- Vanilla Cookies: In a large bowl, combine 2 cups of cookie mix, 1 egg, 1 tablespoon milk, and 1 teaspoon vanilla. Mix until well blended and drop by teaspoons onto a greased cookie sheet. Bake for 15 minutes.
- Granola Cookies: In a large bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups of cookie mix, 1/2 cup granola, 2 eggs, 2 tablespoons milk, and 1 teaspoon vanilla. Mix until well blended and drop by teaspoons onto a greased cookie sheet. Bake for 15 minutes.
